fx_convention_note: EUR-zone, GBP, AUD FX rates normalized to local/USD convention (previously stored as USD/local). All exchange_rate_vs_usd values now consistently represent units of local currency per 1 USD.

flags_applied.reason: KOSPI level at 4197 — anomaly flag set by source agent. Level consistent with -7.24% drop. Circuit breakers triggered (see upd_077). While the level itself is internally consistent, the extreme daily move context requires UI flagging. Accepted but flagged for display.

KOSPI daily change -7.24% — EXTREME. Circuit breakers triggered per source agent. Driven by dual shock: NK KN-25 MLRS deployment to DMZ (event sig_2026-03-03_018) plus global risk-off from Iran crisis. This is one of the largest single-day KOSPI declines since the 2020 COVID crash. Plausible given the event context but requires UI FLAG and human awareness. Integrating as-is with FLAG status.
